entries.name: Ratchet: Deadlocked / Gladiator 4K Texture Pack
entries.credits: 4K texture pack by knuckles_didintdied; PlayStation and D-pad button assets by Metal-Txus (https://www.deviantart.com/metal-txus/gallery); Switch Button Icons and Controls by Zacksly, CC BY 3.0 (https://zacksly.itch.io, https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/). EmuCoreX only normalized and duplicated identical verified assets for the author-confirmed PAL serial.
entries.description: Multi-region 4K environment, character, weapon, effects and interface replacement pack for the North American and European PS2 releases.
entries.license: See source page terms; Switch button assets CC BY 3.0

entries.name: Need for Speed: Hot Pursuit 2 HD Remaster
entries.credits: HD remaster created by Siggy_Wiggy_Woo; EmuCoreX mirror removes the single community-confirmed broken leaf texture and retains the original source link.
entries.description: Mostly hand-remastered vehicles, tracks, interface and environment textures for the North American and European releases.

entries.name: Need for Speed: Most Wanted Black Edition HD Textures
entries.gameTitle: Need for Speed: Most Wanted Black Edition
entries.credits: HD texture pack created by SomberShroud using 4xHDCube 4; mirrored by EmuCoreX with the original source retained.
entries.description: Extensive upscaled building, vehicle, road, frontend and world texture pack for the North American Black Edition.

entries.name: Gran Turismo 4 HD HUD & UI (US/PAL)
entries.credits: HD HUD and UI created by Silentwarior112; EmuCoreX Western edition retains the complete US, PAL and Online Beta content while omitting Japanese- and Korean-only resources to fit verified distribution limits.
entries.description: Remastered menus, text, dealership images, logos, maps and in-race HUD with corrected 16:9 presentation for western GT4 releases.

entries.name: Gran Turismo 3 Retexture Mobile DDS Edition
entries.credits: GT3 Retexture Mod created by GtafanWRLD; EmuCoreX Mobile DDS edition preserves all 13,714 original DDS replacements while omitting the PNG subset so the pack stays within Android import and GitHub distribution limits.
entries.description: Android-practical edition covering the original pack's high-resolution track, rally and S-class car DDS textures across the main US, PAL and Japanese releases.

entries.name: Gran Turismo 4 HD HUD & UI (Japan/Korea)
entries.credits: HD HUD and UI created by Silentwarior112; EmuCoreX Japan/Korea edition retains Japanese, Korean and shared content while omitting western-only resources to fit verified distribution limits.
entries.description: Remastered menus, regional text, dealership images, logos, maps and in-race HUD for the Japanese and Korean GT4 releases.

entries.name: MGS2 HD UI
entries.credits: Created and maintained by NathanHigley.
entries.description: High-resolution user-interface texture replacement pack.

entries.description: PC-derived texture replacement pack for the North American PS2 release.
